CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-09-2018 Off Calendar

Mtn To Approve Prop 65 Settlement
Off Calendar Feb-16-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Christopher Tuttle, Esq. 510-848-8880 pf the The Chanler Group for Plaintiff PAUL WOZNIAK.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Unopposed. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF PAUL WOZNIAK'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement and Consent Judgment.

Plaintiff Wozniak's motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement is GRANTED. No opposition filed and the motion complies with the Health and Safety Code.

Order and Consent Judgment are signed. (see scanned Order and Consent Judgment for details)

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR#7489, mgheno@sftc.org, Reported. (D302/RBU)
